meaning: 世界性的新闻组网络系统
examples: Usenet is a collection of discussion groups, known as newsgroups, to which anybody can subscribe.
Linux newsgroups are some of the most heavily read on Usenet.
The USENET comp.lang.perl.misc newsgroup is a wonderful place to learn.
If you had a friend in college, you could borrow their VMS account to access Usenet.
At the time, Usenet wasn't the dark, gritty back alley of the internet that it is now.
